title: Vegan Chestnut Pilaf Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful vegan pilaf bowl featuring roasted chestnuts and a variety of herbs.

ingredients.name: Chewy Wholesome Bites (such as quinoa or farro)

instructions: 2. In a bowl, toss chestnuts with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
3. Cook pilaf according to package instructions.
4. In a large bowl, combine cooked pilaf, roasted chestnuts, wholesome bites, parsley, and dill.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and 1 tbsp olive oil. Pour dressing over the pilaf mixture and toss to combine.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
